name: The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development 4%-FRN-10% SNR EMTN 11/03/2019 EUR1000
summary: The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development 4%-FRN-10% SNR EMTN 11/03/2019 EUR1000 is a bond issued by the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD). It is a floating rate note (FRN) with a maturity date of 2019.
